Registry / Terms / cryptographic means

cryptographic means

—Not in VIM/VIML G 18 #02459 · 6 instances

Suggested actions

  1. HIGH No authoritative definition in VIM or VIML.
  2. MEDIUM 6 distinct definitions — harmonise.

Publication instances

6 distinct definitions across 6 publications.

6 unique definitions (each used by only one publication)

Ed.YearPublicationClauseG 18 #Definition
202X2016OIML R146-1:20162.2.402802
encryption of data by the sender (storing or transmitting program) and decryption by the receiver (reading program) with the purpose of hiding information from unauthorized persons electronic signing of data with the purpose of enabling the receiver or user of the data to verify the origin of the data, i.e. to prove their authenticity
pending
20102008OIML D 31:20083.1.1102178
encryption of data by the sender (storing or transmitting program) and decryption by the receiver (reading program) with the purpose of hiding information from unauthorized persons. Electronic signing of data with the purpose of enabling the receiver or user of the data to verify the origin of the data, i.e. to prove their authenticity.
pending
202X2016OIML R059-1:20162.2.102459
encryption of data by the sender (storing or transmitting program) and description by the receiver (reading program) with the purpose of hiding information from unauthorized persons. Electronic signing of data with the purpose of enabling the receiver or user of the data to verify the origin of the data, i.e. to prove their authenticity [OIML D31, 3.1.11]
pending
202X2023OIML D031:20233.2.1002965
means such as encryption and decryption with the purpose of providing confidentiality, or hashes and signatures (see 3.2.14) to ensure integrity and authenticity
pending
202X2025OIML R142-1:20253.2403714
means such as encryption/decryption with the purpose of hiding information from unauthorized persons (see OIML D31, 3.1.13), or hashes and signatures to ensure integrity and authenticity
pending
202X2021OIML R126-1:20213.3.302966
means such as encryption/decryption with the purpose of hiding information from unauthorized persons, or hashes and signatures to ensure integrity and authenticity (OIML D 31, 3.1.8)
pending
